title: SpaceInvite methods: get, changes, set + fixture tests
description:
Implement SpaceInvite methods in methods/misc.rs:
- SpaceInvite/get: standard /get shape; fields: id, spaceId, inviterId, inviteeId, status (pending/accepted/declined/expired), createdAt
- SpaceInvite/changes: new method per IMPROVEMENTS.md §7 — include SpaceInvite state in StateChange subscription
- SpaceInvite/set: create (send invite), update (accept/decline), destroy (withdraw invite)
- Fixture tests: get, changes, accept, decline

Fixture files: tests/fixtures/space_invite_*.json
